
```{python}
import sys
import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path
from loguru import logger
from io import StringIO

from owlplanner.config.toml_io import load_toml
from owlplanner.config.plan_bridge import config_to_plan
from owlplanner import mylogging as log

from owlroost.display.bootstrap import build_display_registry
from owlroost.metrics.bootstrap import build_metrics_registry
from owlroost.schema.bootstrap import build_schema_registry
from owlroost.catalog.loaders import load_catalog_rows

from owlroost.display.operations.sorting import apply_canonical_sort, apply_sort
from owlroost.display.operations.row_ops import apply_top, attach_row_ids
from owlroost.display.operations.filtering import apply_filters

from owlroost.display.loaders import load_case_rows,load_trial_as_row
from owlroost.display.materializers.materialize import materialize_view
from owlroost.display.specs import DisplayView


from owlroost.display.renderers.latex_table import render_latex_table
from owlroost.display.renderers.markdown_table import render_markdown_table
from owlroost.display.renderers.rich_table import render_rich_table

pd.set_option(
    "display.max_rows",
    None,
)

# set up logging
s = StringIO()
logstreams = [s,s]
x = logger.remove()
x = logger.add(sys.stderr, level="INFO")

schema_registry = build_schema_registry()
metrics_registry = build_metrics_registry()
display_registry = build_display_registry(
    schema_registry=schema_registry,
    metrics_registry=metrics_registry,
)
catalog_rows = load_catalog_rows(
    schema_registry=schema_registry,
    metrics_registry=metrics_registry,
    display_registry=display_registry,
)
catalog_index = {row["field_name"]: row for row in catalog_rows}


# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Load bundle get the case and trial
# ---------------------------------------------------------
# When done, you'll have access to:
# -
#metadata_path = Path("metadata.yml")

#bundle = load_bundle(metadata_path)
#trial = bundle["trial_rows"][0]
#case = trial.get("_case")

toml_path = str(next(Path.cwd().glob("trial.toml"), None))
diconf, dirname, _ = load_toml(toml_path)
plan = config_to_plan(diconf, dirname=dirname,logstreams=logstreams)
x = plan.resolve()
x = plan.setPlotBackend("matplotlib")

rows = load_trial_as_row(".",metrics_registry=metrics_registry)

```
